name: Train Anarchy
author: seanyushoumori
description:
Take the limiters off your **trains**. Train Anarchy lifts Subway Builder's rolling-stock limits for every train type — each a separate toggle in the **Settings** menu. Companion to **Track Anarchy** (which lifts the build limits).

**Capacity & throughput** (on by default — useful, sim-stable):
- Any train length (1–100 cars)
- Exact car counts (no car-set snapping)
- Unlimited frequency (trains/hour)
- Instant station stops (no dwell)
- No station-approach slowdown

**Full anarchy** (off by default — extreme, feeds the physics sim):
- Unlimited top speed
- Instant acceleration & braking
- Huge passenger capacity
- Full-speed crossovers

Each toggle applies the relaxed value when on and restores that train type's vanilla default when off.
